measures.title: Replacement Educational Programs and Operations Levy
measures.what_it_does: Replaces the expiring educational programs and operations levy for 2027 through 2030.
measures.cost_line: Approximately $0.36 per $1,000 of assessed value ($1,115,000 to $1,235,000 per year).

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.
